seo.title: Wealth & Freedom : You can Have Both I Kirtan Shah
seo.description: In this insightful conversation, financial expert Kirtan Shah shares a holistic approach to financial planning, where building wealth, maintaining

takeaways: Kirtan Shah frames financial planning as more than investing: it rests on managing risk, keeping an emergency fund, planning taxes, and only then building investments.
Disciplined, goal-based investing is treated as a stronger path than trying to time the market, with clear goals giving your money a purpose.
Your strategy is meant to shift with your life stage, so an early-career professional, a couple in their 40s, and someone navigating volatility in their 50s each need a different plan.
The episode makes the case that enjoying the present matters as much as saving for the future, so healthcare and lifestyle spending have a rightful place in the plan.
The closing advice is simple and repeatable: buy term insurance, keep investing, and do not forget to actually enjoy your life.
